name: Alligator Sauce Piquant-1
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds Alligator meat, trimmed and cubed
2 cups Tomatoes, fresh or canned, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, make a dark roux with olive oil and flour until the mixture is dark brown.
2. Add onion, green onion, bell pepper, and celery; cover and cook until onions are clear, stirring occasionally.
3. Add tomatoes and continue cooking for 10 minutes, stirring often.
4. Add water to make a thick liquid. Stir in garlic, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, salt, Tabasco sauce, white wine, and tomato sauce. Mix well.
5. Add alligator meat, cubed, and enough water to cover the ingredients by 2 inches. Stir to mix.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, stirring frequently.
7. Reduce heat to low and cover. Check occasionally and stir to prevent sauce from sticking.
8. Continue cooking for 3 to 4 hours until the meat is tender.
9. Serve over cooked rice or spaghetti with Parmesan cheese.
10. Freeze leftovers in serving size containers.
